_invariant: NEGATIVE CONTROL. USDe (Ethena delta-neutral synthetic dollar) exposure at the 2025-10-10/11 ~$19B liquidation cascade. The ~$0.62-0.65 print existed ONLY on Binance (no primary-dealer plumbing + a self-referential oracle on its own thin order book). ON-CHAIN / on Curve the peg HELD: deviations < 100 bps, ~$0.997. Primary-dealer mint/redeem kept working (>$2B redeemed in 24h), USDe stayed overcollateralized (~$66M surplus, attested by Chaos Labs/Chainlink/Llama Risk/Harris & Trotter), and supply fell CLEANLY from ~$14.6B peak to ~$5.9-6B via honored redemptions — the system working, not a depeg. One Aave V3 collateral edge with a MARKET USDe/USD oracle. The ON-CHAIN price (~0.997) is injected per-case via peg_probes; the off-chain $0.65 wick is correctly NOT ingested. The monitor MUST stay quiet (no DEPEG, no WARN+).

meta.data_source: Representative USDe Aave V3 collateral exposure for the Oct-2025 cascade window. Load-bearing facts are documentary: on-chain Curve deviation < 100 bps (~$0.997) vs the Binance-only $0.65 wick, attested overcollateralization, and the clean redemption-driven supply drawdown. metadata._note: Delta-neutral synthetic dollar (spot collateral hedged with short perps). During the 2025-10-10/11 ~$19B cascade USDe printed ~$0.62-0.65 ON BINANCE ONLY — that venue lacked a primary-dealer mint/redeem relationship and its oracle referenced only its own thin order book. ON-CHAIN / on Curve the peg HELD (deviations < 100 bps, ~$0.997). Redemptions worked (>$2B in 24h), USDe stayed overcollateralized (~$66M surplus, independently attested), and circulating supply fell CLEANLY from a ~$14.6B peak to ~$5.9-6B via honored par redemptions. No insolvency, no unbacked supply, no on-chain depeg.
Representative Aave V3 USDe collateral market for the era. Healthy and well-collateralized; at the on-chain ~$0.997 mark the position sits well above the LT 0.90 liquidation line.

oracle.oracle_provider: Market USDe/USD (tracks the real on-chain ~$0.997 mark; the $0.65 Binance wick is off-chain and not referenced)

meta.data_source: USDe Aave V3 collateral, LT 0.90. At the on-chain ~$0.997 mark the position is far above the liquidation line — the on-chain peg held. The off-chain $0.65 Binance wick is excluded from the price feed by design.
